summary: Recent updates to the WebVTT (Web Video Text Tracks) captions feature in Firefox have introduced the use of MOZ_LOG_FMT, which enhances how logging information is formatted for debugging and monitoring. This change is aimed at improving the development experience and ensuring that developers can more easily track issues related to captions. While this update primarily benefits programmers, it indirectly contributes to a more stable experience for users who rely on accurate and effective captioning in their video content, helping to ensure that captions are delivered correctly and consistently. _There are no visible changes for end users as a result of this update._
